title: Reproducibility package: Conflict-Weighting Variable Selection for Reactive Multi-Objective Job-Shop and RCPSP Scheduling
description: Code, raw results and analysis scripts for the manuscript 'Conflict-Weighting Variable Selection for Reactive Multi-Objective Job-Shop and RCPSP Scheduling: A Controlled Constraint-Programming Study' (submitted to the Journal of Scheduling). Includes the Choco 4.10.14 implementation of the three conflict-weighting increment rules (dom/wdeg2004 scope-sharing, per-variable AbsCon refinement, branching-history augmentation), the epsilon-constraint multi-objective solver, the reactive-snapshot campaign orchestrator with NSGA-II/III baselines, raw campaign CSVs, the controlled search-tree experiment harness and results, and scripts reproducing every table and figure of the paper. See REPRODUCIBILITY.md.
